text:
International
ON/OFF 12 digits and starts with 91 Process to domestic
OFF/ON 12 Digits and does not start with 91 Process to domestic
OFF 12 Digits and does not start with 91 Process to International
There are some countries where the Sender ID is accepted only Numeric; hence, it needs to be
taken care of while sending the International messages.
Response
In case there is any incomplete or incorrect parameter passed in API, it will display the error
message. The following table gives a list of various status used in ConnectOne.
Example 1
Sample Request
http:// 172.16.2.99/ConnectOneUrl/SendXml/SendSmsXml?data=
<MESSAGE VER="1.2">
<USER USERNAME="xxxx" PASSWORD="xxxx" DLR="0"/>
<SMS TEXT="093909010917093E092E093E002000200939094B00200917092F093E" ID="2"
PRTY="2" TYPE =”2”>
<ADDRESS FROM=" Sender2" TO="919986102384" SEQ="1" CUST_MID="12347"/>
<ADDRESS FROM=" Sender2" TO="93201476" SEQ="2"/>
</SMS>
</MESSAGE>
Sample Response
<MESSAGEACK>
